Name: Percentage of 'Accepted + Wait' occurrences that are followed by 'Accepted + In Progress' within the same case
Metric: Percentage of 'Accepted + Wait' out of all 'Accepted + In Progress'

Name: Frequency of 'Accepted + Wait' compared to the frequency of 'Accepted + Wait - User'
Metric: Percentage of 'Accepted + Wait' out of all 'Accepted + Wait - User'

Name: Percentage of cases where 'Accepted + Wait' occurs before 'Completed + In Call'
Metric: Percentage of 'Accepted + Wait' out of all 'Completed + In Call'

Name: Number of distinct cases containing at least one 'Accepted + Wait' activity
Percentage of 'Accepted + Wait' activities that occur in variants also containing 'Completed + Resolved' and 'Completed + Closed'
Metric: Percentage of 'Accepted + Wait' out of all 'Completed + Resolved'

Name: Frequency of 'Accepted + Wait' relative to the total number of wait-type activities (e.g., 'Accepted + Wait - User', 'Accepted + Wait - Vendor', 'Accepted + Wait - Customer', 'Accepted + Wait - Implementation')
Metric: Percentage of 'Accepted + Wait' out of all 'Accepted + Wait - User'

Name: Percentage of variants starting with 'Accepted + In Progress' that include 'Accepted + Wait' before reaching 'Completed + In Call'
Metric: Percentage of 'Accepted + Wait' out of all 'Completed + In Call'

Name: Number of 'Accepted + Wait' events that occur in cases with impact level 'High'
Metric: Number of 'Accepted + Wait' activities == 'High' where ma is the last value of impact

Name: Percentage of 'Accepted + Wait' that is not followed by any other wait-related activity before case completion
Metric: Percentage of 'Accepted + Wait' out of all cases where 'Accepted + Wait - User' does not happen

Name: Frequency of 'Accepted + Wait' in comparison to the most frequent activity 'Accepted + In Progress'
Metric: Percentage of 'Accepted + Wait' out of all 'Accepted + In Progress'

Name: Percentage of process instances where 'Accepted + Wait' directly precedes 'Completed + In Call'
Metric: Percentage of 'Accepted + Wait' out of all 'Completed + In Call'
